songs.title: Uptight
feed: “Uptight” by Green Day spends a 4th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 93 sales units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 155 streams units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 367,710 total units.

songs.title: Redundant
feed: “Redundant” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 4 spots to #2.
“Redundant” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 4 spots to #2.
“Redundant” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 6 airplay units.

songs.title: Extraordinary Girl / Letterbomb
feed: “Extraordinary Girl / Letterbomb” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 16 spots to #3.
